scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for maimai

notes.combo_definition: ring-lane hit objects with segmented slides and touch groups

tips.rationale: maimai charts expose precise ring-based timing, segmented slides, and touch groups, enabling deterministic movement, hand-positioning, and rhythm density tips once mapped to the element taxonomy.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: note_events kinds must start with 'maimai_' or be bpm/measure change events

table.name: time monotonicity invariant
table.expected: time_ms must be non-decreasing across note_events

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating

consistency_checks.notes: maimai consistency checks follow the Bandori anchor: enforce structural scope, ring-lane geometry, timing invariants, and Phase 4 gating rather than gameplay semantics or DB parity.
